title: taraxacum koehleri
intro: Taraxacum koehleri is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves, native to Eastern Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum koehleri include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum koehleri can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
